===Befriended===
{{TrainerPoké
|trainer=Lusamine
|pkmn=Clefable
|type1=Fairy
|stage1=Cleffa
|stage2=Clefairy
|main=yes
|gender=female
|img=Lillie Clefable.png
|cap2=Lillie and Lusamine's Clefable
|epnum=SM044
|epname=A Dream Encounter!
|vajp=Megumi Hayashibara
|vaen=Kate Bristol
|vaennote=<small>[[SM050]]-[[SM078]]</small>
|vaen2=Sarah Natochenny
|vaen2note=<small>[[SM085]]-present</small>
|desc=Lillie grew up alongside {{an|Lusamine}}'s {{p|Clefable}} when she was still a {{p|Cleffa}} and later a {{p|Clefairy}}, as shown in a family portrait and several flashbacks. The two were inseparable playmates before Lillie developed her fear of Pokémon, and often played together with her favorite [[Poké Doll]]. At one point, Lusamine decided to evolve Clefairy into Clefable with a [[Moon Stone]], which Lillie did not agree with, and thus leaving her upset.

In ''[[SM053|Rescuing the Unwilling!]]'', while trying to rescue Lusamine, Clefable, under the influence of {{Dl|Ultra Beasts (anime)|Nihilego}}, was sent out to stop {{Ash}} and Lillie. Lillie, along with Snowy and [[Ash's Lycanroc]], stayed behind to stop her. Lillie was able to break {{p|Nihilego}}'s hold of Clefable by showing her the Poké Doll and reminding her of all the memories they had shared together.}}
